scripts.build: npm run build -w @matchflow/types && npm run build -w @matchflow/concourse-graph && npm run build -w @matchflow/ui && npm run build -w @matchflow/flow-engine && npm run build -w @matchflow/web && npm run build -w @matchflow/functions --if-present
scripts.test:unit: npx tsx --test test/unit/concourse-graph.test.ts test/unit/flow-engine.test.ts test/unit/analytics.test.ts && npx tsx --tsconfig apps/web/tsconfig.json --test test/unit/db.test.ts && npx tsx --import ./test/helpers/loader.ts --test test/unit/auth.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:regression && npm run test:e2e
